message:
fix: Saturating arithmetic in inline_mode and rope; fix clippy lints

- inline_mode.rs: Use saturating_add(1) in ui_top_row() to prevent
  u16 overflow when term_height is near max
- inline_mode.rs: Use saturating_add in render loop for cursor
  positioning to prevent u16 overflow
- rope.rs: Use saturating_add in line_col_to_byte() for defense-in-depth
  on character index calculation
- cli.rs: Collapse nested if-let into let-chains per clippy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
